'''galudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uhllo|uhllo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uhllo|uhllo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| galudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælidith|gælidith]] || [[word:gælidij|gælidij]] || [[word:gælidish|gælidish]] || [[word:gælidi|gælidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:galuluduth|galuluduth]] || [[word:galuluduj|galuluduj]] || [[word:galuludush|galuludush]] || [[word:galuludu|galuludu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:galuduth|galuduth]] || [[word:galuduj|galuduj]] || [[word:galudush|galudush]] || [[word:galudu|galudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:galufduth|galufduth]] || [[word:galufduj|galufduj]] || [[word:galufdush|galufdush]] || [[word:galufduf|galufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galuduthu|galuduthu]] || [[word:galuduju|galuduju]] || [[word:galudushu|galudushu]] || [[word:galuduku|galuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galuduth|galuduth]] || [[word:galuduj|galuduj]] || [[word:galudush|galudush]] || [[word:galudu|galudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galuduthul|galuduthul]] || [[word:galudujul|galudujul]] || [[word:galudushul|galudushul]] || [[word:galudukul|galudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galuduthuthu|galuduthuthu]] || [[word:galudujuju|galudujuju]] || [[word:galudushushu|galudushushu]] || [[word:galuduku|galuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galuduthun|galuduthun]] || [[word:galudujun|galudujun]] || [[word:galudushun|galudushun]] || [[word:galudukun|galudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galuduthuoro|galuduthuoro]] || [[word:galudujuoro|galudujuoro]] || [[word:galudushuoro|galudushuoro]] || [[word:galudukuoro|galudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
